decisions.containerPolicy: Psalms remains a governed 155-record root array. Do not force it into the standard canonical OT chapter schema without a separate migration.
decisions.canonicalPsalmPolicy: Psalms 1-150 carry main psalm translation lanes.
decisions.orthodoxAppendixPolicy: Psalms 151-155 are present as Orthodox appendix material and are not normal canonical OT chapter rows.
decisions.grailPolicy: Grail1963 is a liturgical psalter lane and uses its own formatting/numbering conventions.
decisions.nrsvPolicy: The NRSV key in data/bible/OT/psalms.json is not promoted as a trusted Bible NRSV lane by this governance pass.
decisions.sourcePolicy: This pass does not adjudicate Psalm text provenance. It freezes current shape and prevents accidental normalization or false trust.
decisions.consumerPolicy: Existing consumers and audits expecting the 155-record psalter array remain supported.
